intent: The Weirgate Release — AFTERMATH: Caden has broken past Vec and reached Wren; the disruption is a heartbeat too much and the gate fails catastrophically; the flood takes the town. Caden saved his teacher and drowned hundreds, and he knows it. (The three worldview flags are set by the sequence, not here.)

say.text: I saved her. The water took the town. I know what I did.
